titleStmt.title: SII 35.30: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 30. (A.R. No. 76 of 1951-52.) BĀḶAMBĪḌ, KOD TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Stone (No. III) set up near Vishaharēśvara temple.

This inscription referring itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva is dated in the Chālukya-Vikrama year 12, Prabhava, Phālguṇa ba. 11, Sunday corresponding to A.D. 1088, February 20, Sunday f.d.t. 14.

It registers a gift of land taken on lease from interest on money deposited with the Thousand Mahājanas of the mahāgrāma Piriya-Keṟeyūr, who are described with several epithets such as “Those that had possessed restraint, self-control, self-study, meditation, keeping the mind collected, silence, principles, etc., who were busy with study, teaching, performing sacrifice and causing to do so, giving and taking, who were like Brahma in lores like logic, grammar, history, poetry, drama, critics, whose white fame had reached the ends of all the worlds, who were the royal swan in the lakes of Nyāya, Vaiśēshika, Lōkāyata, Sāṅkhya, Bauddha and Arhanta (philosophies), who were the sacred mark on the forehead of the country of Banavasi, an adamantine cage to the resorters, an elephant to the wicked, givers in abundance, speakers of the same words formally uttered by them, brave in carrying out their work, destroyers of the root of their enemies, etc., and men endowed with the virtue of bestowing favour and punishing. These Thousand (Mahājanas) of Piriya-Keṟ eyūr headed by Sōmayāji, disciple of Vāsudēva, Vāsudēva-Chaṭṭōpādhyāya, Padmanābhayya the head man (ūroḍeya) of Pervvūr, Kaliya Hattimayya, Hālavuṇḍimayya, Nārayaṇa-Chaṭṭōpādhyāya, Chēdimayya of Ahitāgni, Dāsayya (son of) Cheṭṭayya Kēśavakravinta of Kōṭiyamma and Sivaṇa-Kravinta of Gaṅge assembled on the date specified in 11. 20 and 21 and sold to Būtagavuṇḍa son of Dēvayya one mattar of guṇiga land in Gopavaḷḷi for 8 gadyāṇas. The land was donated by Būtagāvuṇḍa for food-offering to god Paṇḍaraṅgēśvara.
Sēnabōva Appaṇa wrote the record and Nēmōja engraved it. Pub.: in K.I. Vol. IV, No. 32.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūḷastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . ©
© svasti samastabhunāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvaraṁ parama
bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakulatilakaṁ cāḷukyabharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijaya
rājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire yama
niyamusvādhyayadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭānaparāyaṇa hōmajapasamādhiguṇa
śīlasaṁpannaradhyayanādhyāpanayajanayājanadānapratigrahaśaṭkarmmanirataranēka
tarkkavyākaraṇapurāṇakāvyanāṭakavātsyāyanādi vidyāsārāsāravicāra
cārucatura caturānanaruṁ sakaladigaṁntarapravarttitasudhāṁśudhavaḷadīdhitinyāya vai
śēṣika lōkāyata śāṁkhya cauddhāruhata mīmāṁsasarōvararājahaṁsaruṁ banavā
sidēśalālaṭatilakaruṁ śaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjararumahitajanakuṁjarar tappe
tappuvarmmaṟegevare kāvarppiridanīvarēkavākya calakke balvalegaḷ munivara bēraṁ
kīrttākāśakettuvarnnaḍegōḍemallaridiṁrdoḍellamanottikoḷva sāpānugrahasa
marttharumappa śrīmanmahāgrāmaṁ piriyakeṟeyūra yalpāriga vāsudēThe letter ra is written above the line.
śitacaṭṭa sōmayājigaḷuṁ caṭṭabhaḷārara vāsudēva caṭṭōpādhyāyaruṁ
pervvarurvva Ūrūḍeya padmanābhayyanuṁ kaliya hattimayyanuṁ hāla
vuṇḍimayyanuṁ nārāyaṇacaṭṭōpādhyāyaru Āhitāgnigaḷa cē
dṭimayyanu caṭṭayyana dāsayyanuṁ kūṭeyammana kēśavakra
vintaru gaṁgeya śivaṇakravintarantavarpra mukhavāgiThe letter ra is written above the line.
sāsirvvaruṁ gōsaṇemūla neredu sarvvēkavākyādinoḍaṁbaṭṭu śrīmacā
ḷukya vikramavarṣada 12 neya prabhavasaṁvatsarada pālgu
ṇa bahuḷa 11 Ādityavāramaṁ vyatīpātamuṁ kūḍida puṇyadinadaṁdu
dēvayyana būtagāvuṁṇḍaṁ sāsirvvargge Eṁṭṭu gadyāṇa honna naḍi
vyōjeyaṁ koṭṭa gōpavaḷḷiya bayalahaḷegina garddeyalli guṇi
ganaloṁdu mattaru keyyaṁ śrīmatpaṇḍaṟeṁgēśvaradēvargge nivēdyakke
caṁdrārkkasthāyiyāgi biṭṭa dharmmā . Ī dharmmavanāvanorbbaṁ
pratipāḷisidaṁ prayāge gaye vāraṇāsi kuru
kṣētra varghyatīrtthaveṁba puṇyatīrtthaṁgaḷoḷsāsira kavile
ya kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ paṁcaratnadoḷ kaṭṭisi ma
hāvēdapāragarappa brāhnaṇargge Ubhayamukhi
dānaṁgoṭṭa phalamakku . I dharmmavanaḷidavaṁnā tīrtthada
lu sāsira kavileyumaṁ sāyira brāhma
ṇaruvaṁ koṁda pātakanaku . © . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō
harēti vasuṁdarāṁ śaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē kri
mi . © . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmasētuṁ nripāṇaṁ kālē kālē
pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvabhūtān caṁdrō bhūyō bhū
yōṁ yācatē rāmacaṁdra . © . śrīmatpaṇḍaṟeṁgēsva
radēvargge mahābhaktiyiṁ śāsana baredaṁ sēnabōva A
ppaṇa kaṁḍurisida nēmōja . maṁgaḷamahā
Digital edition of SII 35.30 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
